prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算 机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等物理类热门专业持续高热推荐，对物理类考生有较强吸引力；本省2026年物理类考生约347,000人，较2025年320,192人增长约8.4% ，竞争有所加剧但增幅远低于历史类；湖南师范大学位于本省长沙市，对本省考生有天然的地域吸引力；该校在本省物理 类招生占比高，2025年物理类计划1704人占该校物理类总计划较大比例。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 55054 → 16439 → 22037 → 25681 → 28527. From 2021 to 2022, it moved forward significantly by about 38615 places, then gradually moved backward in subsequent years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12088 places over the last 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 28527. Provincial Physics Category enrollment plans: 730 in 2021, 1131 in 2022, 1108 in 2023, 1354 in 2024, and 1704 in 2025. In 2026, Physics Category has 1514 places plus Medical Category 409 places (Medical Category subject requirements are Physics Category), totaling 1923 places, an increase of about 219 places compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 12.85%. The expansion is significant, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked about 92nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents. Douyin popularity ranking is 100th, with average reviews. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, only Foreign Language and Literature achieved A-, while Physics Category related disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, etc.) did not reach A- level, limiting the appeal of advantageous disciplines to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Popular Physics Category majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates. In 2026, the number of provincial Physics Category candidates is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, intensifying competition but with a growth rate far lower than that of History Category. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, offering natural regional appeal to provincial candidates. The university has a high proportion of Physics Category enrollment in the province; in 2025, the Physics Category plan of 1704 places accounts for a large proportion of the university's total Physics Category enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings over the past 3 years, the significant enrollment expansion of about 12.85% in 2026, and the increase in Physics Category candidates of about 8.4%, the expansion rate exceeds the candidate growth rate, which is the most critical factor driving the ranking backward (weakening competition). It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 30926, with a range of 30426–31426.

If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>31426), you should use Tier 3 majors as safety options, prioritizing Foreign Language and Literature (A- discipline) and majors with good employment prospects.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 9170 → 3489 → 4354 → 4859 → 5262. From 2021 to 2022, it moved forward significantly by about 5681 places, then gradually moved backward in subsequent years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1773 places over the past three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5262. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 459 in 2021, 616 in 2022, 610 in 2023, 1115 in 2024, and 828 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 837, a slight expansion of about 1.09% compared to 2025, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 92nd, with recent rankings fluctuating between 86 and 92, overall stable. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a teacher ethics incident (a professor from the College of Arts publicly humiliated a student seeking help), which had a slight negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 100th, with average reviews and low short video exposure. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Languages and Literature was rated A-, while other disciplines did not reach the A- level, with a limited number of advantageous disciplines, providing limited boost to overall application enthusiasm.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors in 2024 was polarized and wait-and-see, with a cooling trend compared to the 2022 recommendation heat. In 2026, the number of provincial History Category examinees is approximately 187,000, an increase of about 31.2% from 142,547 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, offering natural regional appeal to local examinees. The university has a high proportion of provincial enrollment; in 2025, the History Category plan of 828 accounted for a large proportion of the university's total History Category plan, with strong application willingness from local examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings over the past three years, the 2026 plan's slight expansion of only 1.09%, a significant 31.2% increase in provincial History Category examinees, and negative reputation factors, the surge in examinee numbers is the most critical factor driving ranking advancement (intensified competition). It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 5216, with a range of 4716–5716.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 湖南师范大学医学类在湖南省近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年54227名（计划91人）、2022年4534名（计划262人）、2023年4744名（计划233人）、2024年23825名（计划286 人）、2025年33968名（计划393人）。2021—2023年位次波动剧烈，主要因当年医学类录取数据中包含了历史类护理学专业，导致最低位次异常偏低。2024年起选科要求调整后， 位次回归至物理类主导区间，2024年23825名、2025年33968名，呈现显著上升趋势（位次数字增大，竞争加剧）。2026年医学类招生计划为409人，较2025年的393人扩招16人，增 幅约4.07%，扩招幅度温和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学是国家211工程重点建设高校、双一流建设高校，位于湖南省会长沙。学校医学部依托综合性大学平台发展，虽非传统医科强校，但近年来医学学科建设投入持续加 大，临床医学等专业在省内认可度稳步提升。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来全国报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。湖南省内医学类招生规模整体有限，湖南师范大学医学部作为省属重点大学中的医学 培养单位，对省内考生具有较强吸引力。2026年医学类总计划409人，较2025年略有增加，但相对于持续增长的报考需求，供给增量有限，预计竞争态势仍将保持高位。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型计算及历年位次趋势分析，预测湖南师范大学2026年医学类最低录取位次约为35000名，较2025年的33968名继续小幅上升（更难进），波动区间预计在34500—3 5500名之间。扩招带来的位次下行压力被持续升温的医学报考热度所抵消，位次呈温和上升态势。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University's medical category in Hunan Province over the past five years are: 2021: 54,227th (plan: 91), 2022: 4,534th (plan: 262), 2023: 4,744th (plan: 233), 2024: 23,825th (plan: 286), 2025: 33,968th (plan: 393). Rankings fluctuated sharply from 2021 to 2023, mainly because the medical admission data in those years included the history-category nursing major, causing abnormally low minimum rankings. After the subject selection requirements were adjusted in 2024, rankings returned to the physics-category dominant range: 23,825th in 2024 and 33,968th in 2025, showing a significant upward trend (ranking number increases, competition intensifies). The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 409, an increase of 16 from 393 in 2025, a growth of about 4.07%, a moderate expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a key national university under the 211 Project and a Double First-Class construction university, located in Changsha, the capital of Hunan Province. The university's medical department develops on a comprehensive university platform. Although not a traditional strong medical school, investment in medical discipline construction has been increasing in recent years, and the recognition of majors such as clinical medicine within the province is steadily improving.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the national popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology facing particularly intense competition. The overall enrollment scale for medical majors in Hunan Province is limited. As a medical training unit within a provincial key university, Hunan Normal University's medical department has strong appeal to provincial candidates. The total medical enrollment plan for 2026 is 409, a slight increase from 2025, but relative to the continuously growing demand for applications, the supply increase is limited, and the competitive situation is expected to remain high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical ranking trend analysis, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical category in 2026 is approximately 35,000th, a slight increase (harder to enter) from 33,968th in 2025, with a fluctuation range expected between 34,500th and 35,500th. The downward pressure on rankings from enrollment expansion is offset by the continuously rising popularity of medical applications, resulting in a moderate upward trend in rankings.

- Pharmacy
